author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Try `/chaos flip`, `/chaos roll`, `/chaos ask` — pure café chaos, no economy.
name: chaoscoin
short: Chaos coin: flip, roll, oracle (café flavor text)
description: Hybrid commands: chaos flip, chaos roll (2–100 sides), chaos ask. Random outcomes wrapped in silly coffee-shop metaphors. No currency or persistence.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
